description: From garage startup to global platform.

items.title: 2019 — The Beginning
items.description: Two engineers frustrated with deployment complexity start building a better solution.

items.title: 2021 — Growth
items.description: Crossed 1,000 customers, raised Series B, expanded to 50 employees.

items.title: 2023 — Scale
items.description: Reached 25,000 teams, opened European headquarters in Berlin.

items.title: 2025 — Today
items.description: 50,000+ teams, 200 employees, SOC 2 and ISO 27001 certified.
